item.title: Changing wikidot username
item.description: And consequences thereof.
item.content:encoded: My username is sort of unwieldy. I’ve begun shortening it to “Koth” in chat and am thinking of changing my actual username, but I’m worried about the consequences of such. Will places where my name is hyperlinked (Kothardarastrix) automatically change to the new name, or will the links break or something? What about places where it isn’t, like old news pages? Will I need to go back and change those, will they change automatically, will someone else do it, or is not worth worrying about old news pages anyway? Are there any other advantages, disadvantages, or consequences of changing my username that I might not be aware of?

item.title: Sandbox Bug
item.description: Sandbox isn't accepting me as a member, even though I've been accepted.
item.content:encoded: I attempted to access the sandbox to do a draft on an SCP, not to post, just to get some practice in writing one. However, it said the page I'm trying to access does not exist, and brought me to a page that said only "create page". However, when I clicked on it, it said only site administrators, mods, etc. may create a sandbox page. Does anybody know how to fix this?

item.title: [Seeking Greenlight] Sinister Fedora.
item.description: Excuse me, but can somebody give me crits or greenlight on this thread?
item.content:encoded:
Seeking Greenlights: Yes

Page Type: SCP Article

Genre: Humor/Emotional

Page Layout: Containment procedure, description of the entity, interview, and some logs containing hints of the entity's personality and how it's powers work.

Elevator Pitch: A reality-altering pitched black humanoid-entity with a menacing appearance, who grins and smiles endlessly, dressed up in a mafia's suit of the late 19s, however, with the mind of a "helpful scapegoat" and the soul of a benevolent trickster who was formerly a man named Michael Malloy.

Central Narrative:

+ show block
– hide block

After attempting to persuade a female researcher to become his girlfriend while walking her way home, he was convinced to be held in Foundation custody. Based on the logs, Michael states that he was brought back to life by a "transparent ghost" in a pitched-black place after being murdered by a group of "violent scammers" that pretends to be his friends. Michael claims that he was bestowed with a power named "Anti-God", but it is unknown of its effects to all, including Michael. The Foundation temporarily presume it is the name of the reality-bending properties.

The Foundation noted that they must never ask Michael for help in doing tasks or testings that must be taken seriously. As he helps the Foundation, he is unaware of the outcome he may cause and makes many shenanigans on those works. Michael would panic in knowing that he made big mistakes but still tries to hide his shocked feelings and acts carefree about it. As people complain or scold him, he instantly protests in all kinds of ways. This also includes blaming others, mocking them, saying meaningless things that draw a big confusion to the Foundation to be out of words.

The reason why Michael smile endlessly and always jokes around is that:

Michael wasn't a person that lived a good life. He never had friends, was all alone, lost his job, his father died in the war, and his mother died due to sickness. Michael doesn't want anyone to experience the same way that he had. He feared to remind of his past.

Hook/Attention-Grabber: A tragic anomaly that smiles endlessly while hiding what it feels inside of its heart. Like we said "The ones that have the brightest smiles, and the loudest laughs have the most painful past.".

Additional Notes: This SCP was inspired by The Mask (1994).

item.title: [Seeking Greenlight] SCP Concept - The Drain Cover
item.description: A floor drain cover which fills the room with water until a victim drowns.
item.content:encoded:
Seeking Greenlights: Yes

Page Type: SCP Article

Genre (Optional): Horror

Page Layout (Optional): N/A (Suggestions Needed)

Elevator Pitch:

  • A floor drain cover that constantly emits a gurgling sound typical in a drain clogged with semi-permeable debris.
  • Upon inspection, it will begin to overflow and fill the room with dark, murky water until the victim drowns.
  • The water overflowing from the drain cover is chemically identical, but significantly less dense than normal water. This makes it very difficult to swim or float in.
  • The drain cover will only begin to overflow if the room is small and closed.
  • All effects only occur when the drain cover is appropriately fixed over a floor drain.

Central Narrative: The SCP was discovered at a Oklahoma public swimming pool showering facility following renovations that made the room a closed area, previously separated with curtains, leading to the death of 2 young boys and their father.

+ show block
– hide block

Hook/Attention-Grabber: The theme is the fear of drowning and the disgust of a drain overflowing with dirty water.

Additional Notes:

  • I want the drain cover to have some psychological abilities, such as:
      • Making victims believe all exits are locked or otherwise broken.
      • Making victims believe the water is unbearably cold.
      • Causing uncontrollable panic when the overflowing begins.

All feedback and criticism is wanted. I am very new to the site and have been thinking carefully about ideas for weeks now. I hope this idea is interesting to readers, or more accurately, that it can become interesting.


As a courtesy to our readers on mobile devices, please collapse long posts. ~Zyn
